121:I[5500,["/tafytax/_next/static/chunks/ebceb92c1a9256c9.js","/tafytax/_next/static/chunks/ff1a16fafef87110.js","/tafytax/_next/static/chunks/def1608ade98dfd7.js"],"Image"]
10:["$","li","13",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Tax Treaties**: Tie-breaker rules in Double Taxation Agreements"}]
11:["$","br","14",{"className":"block h-4"}]
12:["$","h3","15",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"Controlled Foreign Corporations (CFCs)"}]
13:["$","p","16",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"SARS rules for foreign companies:"}]
14:["$","br","17",{"className":"block h-4"}]
15:["$","li","18",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Control Threshold**: >50% participation rights by SA residents"}]
16:["$","li","19",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Attribution Rules**: Income attributed to controlling residents"}]
17:["$","li","20",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Deemed Dividends**: CFC income treated as dividends"}]
18:["$","li","21",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Exemption Limits**: Small CFC exemptions (R1 million annual limit)"}]
19:["$","br","22",{"className":"block h-4"}]
1a:["$","h3","23",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"Foreign Income Exemptions"}]
1b:["$","p","24",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"Certain foreign income may be exempt:"}]
1c:["$","br","25",{"className":"block h-4"}]
1d:["$","li","26",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Foreign Employment Income**: Services rendered abroad (subject to conditions)"}]
1e:["$","li","27",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Foreign Dividends**: May qualify for exemption up to certain limits"}]
1f:["$","li","28",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Interest Exemptions**: Limited exemptions for foreign interest"}]
20:["$","li","29",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Capital Gains**: Some foreign capital gains may be exempt"}]
21:["$","br","30",{"className":"block h-4"}]
22:["$","h2","31",{"className":"text-3xl font-bold text-foreground mt-8 mb-4","children":"International Tax Framework"}]
23:["$","br","32",{"className":"block h-4"}]
24:["$","h3","33",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"Double Taxation Agreements (DTAs)"}]
25:["$","p","34",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"South Africa's network of tax treaties:"}]
26:["$","br","35",{"className":"block h-4"}]
27:["$","li","36",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Treaty Benefits**: Reduced withholding taxes, exemption from tax"}]
28:["$","li","37",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Tie-Breaker Rules**: Determining primary taxing rights"}]
29:["$","li","38",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Non-Discrimination**: Equal treatment with domestic taxpayers"}]
2a:["$","li","39",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Mutual Agreement Procedure**: Resolving disputes between countries"}]
2b:["$","br","40",{"className":"block h-4"}]
2c:["$","h3","41",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"OECD Guidelines"}]
2d:["$","p","42",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"International standards for cross-border taxation:"}]
2e:["$","br","43",{"className":"block h-4"}]
2f:["$","li","44",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Arm's Length Principle**: Transfer pricing guidelines"}]
30:["$","li","45",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Base Erosion and Profit Shifting (BEPS)**: Anti-avoidance measures"}]
31:["$","li","46",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Country-by-Country Reporting**: Transparency for multinationals"}]
32:["$","li","47",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Global Minimum Tax**: 15% minimum tax rate (Pillar Two)"}]
33:["$","br","48",{"className":"block h-4"}]
34:["$","h3","49",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"Common Reporting Standard (CRS)"}]
35:["$","p","50",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"Automatic exchange of financial information:"}]
36:["$","br","51",{"className":"block h-4"}]
37:["$","li","52",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Financial Institutions**: Required to report account holder information"}]
38:["$","li","53",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Account Information**: Balance, income, beneficial ownership"}]
39:["$","li","54",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Automatic Exchange**: Information shared between tax authorities"}]
3a:["$","li","55",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Compliance Requirements**: Due diligence and reporting obligations"}]
3b:["$","br","56",{"className":"block h-4"}]
3c:["$","h2","57",{"className":"text-3xl font-bold text-foreground mt-8 mb-4","children":"Business Structure Options"}]
3d:["$","br","58",{"className":"block h-4"}]
3e:["$","h3","59",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"Branch Operations"}]
3f:["$","p","60",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"Direct presence in foreign markets:"}]
40:["$","br","61",{"className":"block h-4"}]
41:["$","p","62",{"className":"font-semibold text-foreground mt-4","children":"Advantages:"}]
42:["$","li","63",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Simple Setup**: Easier establishment process"}]
43:["$","li","64",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Direct Control**: Centralized management"}]
44:["$","li","65",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Tax Transparency**: Income taxed in home country"}]
45:["$","li","66",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Flexibility**: Easy to restructure or close"}]
46:["$","br","67",{"className":"block h-4"}]
47:["$","p","68",{"className":"font-semibold text-foreground mt-4","children":"Disadvantages:"}]
48:["$","li","69",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Unlimited Liability**: Parent company liable for branch debts"}]
49:["$","li","70",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Permanent Risk**: May create permanent establishment"}]
4a:["$","li","71",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Compliance Burden**: Multiple jurisdiction filings"}]
4b:["$","li","72",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Limited Benefits**: May not access treaty benefits"}]
4c:["$","br","73",{"className":"block h-4"}]
4d:["$","h3","74",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"Subsidiary Companies"}]
4e:["$","p","75",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"Separate legal entities in foreign markets:"}]
4f:["$","br","76",{"className":"block h-4"}]
50:["$","p","77",{"className":"font-semibold text-foreground mt-4","children":"Advantages:"}]
51:["$","li","78",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Limited Liability**: Separate legal personality"}]
52:["$","li","79",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Treaty Access**: Can access DTA benefits"}]
53:["$","li","80",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Local Presence**: Better market integration"}]
54:["$","li","81",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Risk Isolation**: Separates foreign operations"}]
55:["$","br","82",{"className":"block h-4"}]
56:["$","p","83",{"className":"font-semibold text-foreground mt-4","children":"Disadvantages:"}]
57:["$","li","84",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Complex Setup**: More establishment requirements"}]
58:["$","li","85",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Compliance Costs**: Separate filing and reporting"}]
59:["$","li","86",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**CFC Rules**: May trigger CFC attribution"}]
5a:["$","li","87",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Repatriation Issues**: Restrictions on profit repatriation"}]
5b:["$","br","88",{"className":"block h-4"}]
5c:["$","h3","89",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"Hybrid Structures"}]
5d:["$","p","90",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"Combination of different entity types:"}]
5e:["$","br","91",{"className":"block h-4"}]
5f:["$","p","92",{"className":"font-semibold text-foreground mt-4","children":"Options:"}]
60:["$","li","93",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**LLC Classification**: Flexible entity classification"}]
61:["$","li","94",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Holding Companies**: Centralized ownership structure"}]
62:["$","li","95",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Special Purpose Vehicles**: Specific transaction vehicles"}]
63:["$","li","96",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Joint Ventures**: Partnership with local entities"}]
64:["$","br","97",{"className":"block h-4"}]
65:["$","h3","98",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"Digital Presence"}]
66:["$","p","99",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"Online operations without physical presence:"}]
67:["$","br","100",{"className":"block h-4"}]
68:["$","p","101",{"className":"font-semibold text-foreground mt-4","children":"Considerations:"}]
69:["$","li","102",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Economic Presence**: Digital services tax considerations"}]
6a:["$","li","103",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**VAT Obligations**: Cross-border digital services"}]
